{{Shell
|name={{PAGENAME}}
|image={{PAGENAME}}.png
|description=When the soul of the immortal queen was finally captured, its descendants crowdfunded and bought the Snail Shell for it from the Travelers to be its resting place.
|affct=FAME
|hard=DEF
|source=
{{Memetic Catalyst
|number=1061
|relic1=Woman in Blue
|relic2=Veiled Lady
|relic3=Lucy the Ape
|relic4=Night Watch
|relic5=The Walking Man
}}
|color=purple
|earth=8
|water=8
|fire=5
|wind=5
|form=Zombie
|element=Wind
|realm=Rift
|orangehard=DEF
}}
